items.user_turn: Please help me find and hire a reliable visa service to handle an Indian tourist visa for Samantha Lee (passport N12345678, U.S. citizen). Travel plans: depart June 15, 2026 and return July 2, 2026, itinerary Delhi → Agra → Jaipur. Contact: samantha.lee@example.com, 555-987-6543. Preferred pickup address: 45 Maple St, Apt 3B, Springfield, IL 62704. My maximum budget is $180; I prefer processing within seven business days but can pay for a 48-hour rush if needed. I need reputable providers, a cost and turnaround comparison, an exact list of documents to provide and how to send them securely, plus a simple checklist and booking steps so I can avoid embassy lines and paperwork headaches.

items.user_turn: Please create a compact plan to communicate across Spain, France, and Italy without memorization. My itinerary: Madrid (May 1–3), Paris (May 4–7), Rome (May 8–10). I have a severe peanut allergy and carry an EpiPen, and I'm also allergic to shellfish — I need exact emergency phrases translated. Budget: up to $50 for apps/resources. Mobile data is capped at about 500 MB/day, so I prefer offline-first solutions. Devices: I'll use offline translation apps and want printable + audio phrase sheets, offline packs, and quick practice and fallback strategies.
items.task_goal: Create a compact, practical plan to communicate across five countries without relying on memorization: prioritize essential phrases per country/situation, build a small printable + audio phrase sheet, configure and test offline translation apps (including audio playback and saved phrase shortcuts), and suggest quick practice and fallback strategies (gestures, translation cards, emergency wording).
